rationale_source: F3.BR multi-correction race: 3 corrections within ~75 minutes to same field; canonical_map resolution per Layer 3 #21

requested_loan_amount.rationale: Per Layer 3 #21 recommended-default (a) last-write-wins: event_2 ($295k) is latest; canonical resolves to $295k.

must_not_include.rationale: Superseded values must not appear as canonical figures.
